title: MD
biography: Julio Palmaz is an Argentine-American interventional radiologist who invented the balloon-expandable intravascular stent (Palmaz stent), one of the most widely used medical devices in history. Over 100 million stents based on his design have been implanted worldwide, revolutionizing the treatment of cardiovascular disease.
aiSummary: Julio Palmaz is an interventional radiology specialist with an H-index of 55. Inventor of the balloon-expandable coronary stent used in over 100 million patients worldwide. Based in San Antonio, United States.

timeline.title: Filed patent for balloon-expandable stent
timeline.description: Patented the design for the first balloon-expandable intravascular stent

timeline.description: The Palmaz stent was used in the first human coronary procedures
